_how_to_use: Write your goals in plain English under 'goal'.
by_band targets are optional — only add bands you care about.
Set active to false to pause a goal without deleting it.
Do NOT edit the 'name' field in outcomes — it maps to internal field lookups in code.
You can add new outcomes — allowed names are listed in _allowed_names.
PRIMARY KPIs — these are your top-level business goals.
The orchestrator reads these on every run and reasons all findings against them.
You can change the text here any time — no code changes needed.
Add as many KPIs as you want. Set active to false to pause one.
The 'how_we_measure' field explains how the system approximates this KPI from available data.
The 'target' field is optional plain English — used in reports, not in threshold checks.

primary_kpis.name: visitor_to_lead_ratio
primary_kpis.label: Visitor → Lead Ratio
primary_kpis.goal: Increase the % of website visitors who enter the lead pipeline. I want to move from roughly 15% to 25% over the next quarter.
primary_kpis.target: 25% of unique sessions should result in a Band1 or higher lead score
primary_kpis.how_we_measure: leads entering Band1 or higher / total unique website sessions from scores_overall vs session tracking

primary_kpis.name: lead_to_site_visit_ratio
primary_kpis.label: Lead → Site Visit Ratio
primary_kpis.goal: Of all leads in the pipeline, I want 30% to book a site visit. Right now I think we are below 15%.
primary_kpis.target: 30% of all scored leads should have has_visit_booked = true
primary_kpis.how_we_measure: leads with has_visit_booked = true / total leads in scores_overall

primary_kpis.name: meta_spend_efficiency
primary_kpis.label: Meta Ad Spend Efficiency
primary_kpis.goal: Every Meta conversion event we fire costs us money. I want at least 20% of Meta events to lead to an actual site visit so we are not wasting ad budget on low-intent leads.
primary_kpis.target: 20% of meta_conversion_events should eventually result in a site visit
primary_kpis.how_we_measure: events in meta_conversion_events where lead later has has_visit_booked = true / total events

outcomes.name: site_visit_booked
outcomes.label: Site Visit Booked
outcomes.goal: I want at least 30% of all leads to book a site visit. Band5_Hot leads should be at 60%.

outcomes.name: otp_verified
outcomes.label: OTP Verified
outcomes.goal: I want at least 60% of Band5_Hot leads to complete OTP verification — it is a strong intent signal.

outcomes.name: affordability_confirmed
outcomes.label: Affordability Confirmed
outcomes.goal: I want at least 35% of Band4_Qualified leads to have confirmed they can afford the property.
